statement.en: Experiences of Psychological Professionals and Carers in Cancer Care

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is a research thesis/dissertation on psychological support in cancer care. It is not an axiom, theorem, or verifiable proposition. It is a qualitative/empirical study (empirical observation document, not a logical or mathematical axiom). D-FUMT₈ = ZERO (context-dependent, observation-impossible as universal truth-value; specific findings are non-generalizable axioms).

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 時間とともに消耗と共感が螺旋を描き、無限へ溶ける
